assignments.description: Build the in-memory Account record used for the single update: Id from $Record.ParentId, PersonEmail from $Record.EmailAddress.
assignments.name: Set_PersonEmail
assignments.label: Set PersonEmail

decisions.description: Skips processing when this CPE's EmailAddress already matches Account.PersonEmail. This happens on records that the sibling Account-to-CPE flow created or updated as the primary CPE (no further work needed) and prevents redundant Account updates.
decisions.name: Already_Primary
decisions.label: Already Matches PersonEmail?

decisions.description: PersonEmail only exists on Person Accounts. If the parent Account is a business account (organization or household), exit without updating.
decisions.name: Is_Person_Account
decisions.label: Is Person Account?

Flow.description: Syncs ContactPointEmail IsPrimary changes back to the parent Account. When IsPrimary is set to true on a CPE whose EmailAddress does not already match Account.PersonEmail, this flow updates Account.PersonEmail with the CPE's email. Person Accounts only — business accounts are filtered out via the Is Person Account decision. The sibling flow SMQS_Sync_Account_to_ContactPointEmail re-fires on the resulting Account update and reconciles all related CPEs idempotently. Runs after ContactPointEmail create/update and starts email sync back to Account.
Flow.interviewLabel: SMQS Email Sync ContactPointEmail to Account {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: SMQS Email Sync ContactPointEmail to Account

recordLookups.description: Loads the Account so we can read IsPersonAccount and the current PersonEmail before overwriting it.
recordLookups.name: Get_Account
recordLookups.label: Get Account

recordUpdates.description: Single update to the parent Account with the new PersonEmail. The sibling Account-to-CPE flow fires on this update and reconciles all related CPEs.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Parent_Account
recordUpdates.label: Update Parent Account

variables.description: Sparse Account record built in memory and used as the input for the single Account update.
variables.name: var_AccountToUpdate
